title: Cataclysms [By TheOman]
description: Adds a lot of dark creatures and storyline.
body:
**Download GeckoLib for work !**
                                        
                                        
This mod is NOT COMPATIBLE with L_Enders cataclysm mod... Sorry! This is due to the same mod ID/Domain.
  
It's dark here...

It's dark there...


The mod adds a multitude of dark creatures, bosses and events.

To get the Light or Dark Shards, you need to have the Hare attack you and it will drop them!

Quick fact: the flyers that The Real Cataclysm summons are different from the flyers that spawn on their own.

PLEASE WHEN THEY TELL YOU TO RUN DO WHAT YOU ARE TOLD!

If you find any errors, please report them in the comments.

How to **complete the mod?** Yes, the mod has a plot and you can complete it like this: 

**.Wait until the Demon Hare (Cataclysm) attacks you (Run will be written on the screen and in the chat) And you must survive from it. Over time, fragments will fall out of it - 4 light and 1 dark. Then it will disappear and you can make a cross (use JEI for details) After creating a cross, after a while a silhouette will appear and start hunting you. You will need to approach it and it will grab you. You must hit it with a cross and the boss fight will begin. After defeating it, you can find a Hare somewhere nearby who is simply sad ... You must interact with it and it will get up ... HERE IT IS! THE BEFORE THE LAST AND MOST DIFFICULT BOSS - The Real Cataclysm! You defeated the hare and now you are given The Holy Sword that destroys almost all dark creatures with one blow. But suddenly a mini boss will come - C.R.O.W who wants to avenge the death of the cataclysm. By killing him you will receive a dark beak and other fragments. From the dark beak you can make a sword that is strong and atk when you press RMB does something. After some time, Notch himself will give you a gift! You will need to make a sphere out of it (You can eat it, but it's not worth it) The sphere will be needed to crush what will come 3 days after killing The Real Cataclysm - the creature that no one has seen, it is angry because you destroyed its creatures. But the sphere that you made is much more powerful and when you press the RMB when the creature decides to attack you, it will be destroyed, but ... His deputy will come to the rescue. That's what they called him. This is the last boss of the mod. After defeating him, you will finally complete the mod and no creature of darkness will be able to be in the world anymore! (The Real Cataclysm Spawn WILL ONLY BE AVAILABLE IN 1.0.7.5 and the appearance of the final boss - the deputy can only be seen in version 1.1.5).**

It is not recommended to kill the silhouette in a confined space, as this may affect the spawn of the final boss.



Dark-light Block can give you positive effects or drain, and can also be destroyed (random)



To get cataclysm blood you need to: right-click on cataclysm with the butt in your hand and then you will get blood
To get the real cataclysm blood all the same but right-click on the cataclysm boss.





                                                             LORE:



First, a creature appeared that no one had ever seen. It created Silhouette, the Demon Hare, and the Angel. The Angel was always in heaven. Silhouette declared himself king and the Hare began to worship him, but the Angel did not and left Silhouette. The Hare looked for players but could not catch 2 players who were very strong and agile, so the Silhouette decided to catch them himself, and he was able. They became - ??? and ?!?. They worshiped Silhouette and joked about the Hare, but he could not touch them but threatened them. The Hare caught a player who mined diamonds and gave he to Silhouette, who decided to experiment and not only infected him but also mutated into a large creature, his name became Crush. The Rabbit caught the Sniffer and also gave it to Silhouette. He also mutated the Sniffer and he became Observer, which served to transport players and defend. But you came and wanted to stop this madness......................After the death of Silhouette, the Hare went crazy and became the new king who began to continue the work of the silhouette... BUT when you were able to defeat this boss, the same angel who had not left heaven for 10 years came and gave you the Holy Blade and also gave you a lot of experience. One day, an unknown creature appeared, nicknamed C.R.O.W (its origin is unknown, but most likely it was created by a creature that no one has seen) Who hates you for killing The Real Cataclysm and will try to kill you, but you can fight back... But this is not the end... Maybe the creature that no one has ever seen is not very happy that you killed his creations? Apparently now someone will see him... (THE FOLLOWING ONLY AVAILABLE IN VERSION 1.1.5) - After the destruction of the supreme being, his deputy will come and this is the other boss...

If you do not wait for the appearance of the cataclysm (hare), then run the command /run

DO NOT CONFUSE THIS MOD WITH ANOTHER POPULAR MOD WITH A SIMILAR NAME (L_enders Cataclysm)


Credits:

Patricio Meneses - Cataclysm chase theme, bossfight with the real cataclysm.

Rupter - Bossfight theme with silhouette. (taken from the unreleased mod beyond the void)

Nightkilla (NK) - Music disk.

Registrator7 - Idea of ​​lore and he tester...
